title: Origins: Sun Keeper
description: Abandon from the Heavenly Court, become the lone sun, you ready to revenge, become the last sol.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57ffcbf703c7cd4c435ea6922cf8f6f75378493c.png)

# Sun Keeper

**Abandon from the Heavenly Court, become the lone sun, you ready to revenge, become the last sol.**

### Sun Spot
- You get one [Sun Spot] when Selected. Everyone can craft the [Sun Spot], but only you can use the True Power of it. You have 30% more projectile damage delt when using [Sun Spot] and holding it in Main Hand.
  - ![Knowledge book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c6b008514168fad47c3a9aeab3cfbbde05de403.png)
  - ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7420218a54b34f8f08027b9c03405203301e80.png)

### Sun Container
- When completing different challenge, you will learned different Power Hand Seal's from them. It cost one stacks to active any power, Stack will Slowly regenerate.
<details>
<summary>Powers Details and Unlock Requirement</summary>
  
- Explosive arrow(PSS)
  - Unlock by receive creeper head once.
  - Small area block destruction and damage
- Power arrow(SSS)
  - Unlock by Defeat skeleton boss(Random Skeleton will turn to boss when spawn)
  - Drag backward, slightly increase arrow motion
- Hooking arrow(PPS)
  - Unlock by Defeat spider boss(Random Spider will turn to boss when spawn)
  - If arrow hit entity, will pull target, if arrow hit block, will pull blocks(block getting pull data will reset, don't use it on chest).
- Flame arrow(SPS)
  - Unlock by kill 7 blaze
  - If arrow hit entity, will follow up 2 blaze head auto aim target that go through walls, consume 2 blaze stacks, collect 10 stack per blaze killed.
- Flash(PPP) 
  - Unlock by kill Enderman boss(Random Enderman will turn to boss when spawn)
  - teleport to location you looking at(maximum 10 block), increase movement speed.
- Sonic arrow(SPP) 
  - Unlock by Receive sculk catalyst once(with this data pack installed, all Warden able to break any block around them)
  - You arrow will shoot with a sonic boom, massively increase arrow motion, arrow have no gravity.
- Wither soul(PSP)
  - Unlock by receive nether star once(with this data pack installed, all Wither able to break any block around them)
  - If arrow hit entity, will follow up 3 wither skull(area block destruction and damage) auto aim target that go through walls.
- Dragon soul(SSP)
  - Unlock by Defeat Ender Dragon with dragon egg in inventory
  - Deal 2048 damage to target that only have 25% relative health.
</details>

### Hand Seal
- Using [Primary Activator] or [Secondary Activator] to do Hand Seal, Different combination of Hand Seal can use different learned power.

### The Last Sol
- As the one of the Sol's, When you hit any target using [Sun Spot] with spectral arrow in Main Hand, you will recieve one extra spectral arrow. This will not work if you at cold biomes. Only works when using [Sun Spot] and holding it in Main Hand.
- You get 10 spectral arrow when Selected.

### Archer
- As a Archer, you always 50% less damage dealt.

### Blessing from first sun
- When you expose to sun, you will recieve hunger. You have a small bundle that won't drop when defeated. Open with [Crouch] + [Secondary Activator].
